name: Bennigan's Onion Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions in butter and corn oil until onions are transparent, but not well browned.
2. When tender, turn the heat to the lowest setting and sprinkle with flour, stirring vigorously.
3. Pour into a Dutch oven and stir in broths.
4. Heat thoroughly and divide among 8 oven-proof bowls.
5. Float a slice of bread atop each serving.
6. Mix equal parts of cheese with the smooth paste and spread over the bread.
7. Place all bowls on the oven rack, 4 inches from the broiler heat and broil until the cheese melts.
8. Serve at once. Leftover soup freezes well up to 6 months.
